title: AI Ecosystems: Claude vs. SAP/Salesforce & Living Artifacts Explained! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof compares the economics of Claude-based AI queries against self-updating living artifacts in enterprise systems. The piece examines cost-effectiveness trade-offs for integrating AI into dynamic business platforms.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof compares the economics of running Claude-based AI queries against self-updating living artifacts inside enterprise systems such as SAP and Salesforce. It weighs the cost-effectiveness trade-offs of each approach when integrating AI into dynamic business platforms. The takeaway centers on how artifacts that update themselves can shift the cost calculus relative to repeated query-based calls.
